auth.login_title: Sign in to Flow Bright SRP
auth.login_subtitle: Select active tenant organization and enter your credentials to access the platform
auth.password_min: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.confirm_logout_desc: Are you sure you want to sign out of Flow Bright SRP? All localized session data and runtime caches will be securely scrubbed.

dashboard.title: Performance Overview
dashboard.subtitle: Key financial and operational metrics for executive reporting

customers.title: Customer Master CRUD
customers.subtitle: Manage customers profiles
customers.search_placeholder: Search customer name, email or code...
customers.confirm_delete_desc: Are you sure you want to delete this customer record? This action cannot be undone.
customers.form_subtitle_new: Fill in customer details, identity records, and contact profiles
customers.form_subtitle_edit: Update customer details, addresses, demographics, or identity records
customers.upload_doc_hint: Click or drag document image file to upload (PNG, JPG, WEBP)
customers.err_invalid_phone: Invalid Thai mobile phone number format (e.g. 0812345678 or +66812345678)
customers.err_tax_id_required: Tax Identification Number (Tax ID) is required for Company type
customers.err_id_card_required: Thai National ID number is required
customers.err_id_card_format: Thai ID must contain exactly 13 digits
customers.err_driver_license_format: Driver License must contain exactly 13 digits
customers.note_placeholder: Enter additional customer notes or details...

vendors.title: Vendor Master CRUD
vendors.subtitle: Manage supplier relations, tax identification numbers, and supply categories
vendors.search_placeholder: Search supplier name, tax ID or category...
vendors.confirm_delete_desc: Are you sure you want to purge this vendor from the active tenant database?

toast.create_desc: A new {resource} record has been added successfully.
toast.update_desc: The {resource} profile has been modified successfully.
toast.delete_desc: The {resource} record has been removed from the database.

categories.title: Product Categories
categories.subtitle: Organize and manage classification structures for your product inventory
categories.form_subtitle_new: Create a new category node in your inventory classification tree
categories.form_subtitle_edit: Update category classifications, properties, and sorting parameters
categories.upload_image_hint: Drag and drop or click to upload Category icon...
categories.confirm_delete_desc: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this product category? Products associated with it may need relocation.
categories.err_sort_order: Sort order must be a non-negative number

products.title: Products Master
products.subtitle: Manage raw materials, sub-assemblies, and finished products
products.form_subtitle_new: Register a new product in the Master file database
products.form_subtitle_edit: Modify product parameters, stock levels, and analytical properties
products.search_placeholder: Search products by name or SKU...
products.upload_image_hint: Drag and drop or click to upload Product image...
products.confirm_delete_desc: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this product? Transactions and BOM specifications referencing it will remain affected.
products.err_cost: Cost must be a non-negative number
products.err_price: Selling price must be a non-negative number
products.err_stock: Stock count must be a non-negative number
products.err_reserve: Reserve stock must be a non-negative number

boms.title: Bill of Materials (BOM) Master
boms.subtitle: Design assembly structures, formula trees, and component recipes
boms.form_subtitle_new: Register a new Bill of Materials recipe
boms.form_subtitle_edit: Modify Bill of Materials items and versioning
boms.product_placeholder: Search products by name or SKU...
boms.err_version: Version is required and must be at least 1
boms.err_items_empty: At least one component item is required
boms.err_item_quantity: Quantity must be a positive number
boms.confirm_delete_desc: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this BOM? Assembly orders referencing this recipe may fail.

packages.title: Package Master
packages.subtitle: Configure multi-pack bundling and commercial packaging metrics
packages.upload_image_hint: Drag and drop or click to upload Package image...
packages.confirm_delete_desc: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this package? This action cannot be undone.
packages.err_price_invalid: Price must be a non-negative number
packages.err_items_empty: Package must contain at least one product
packages.form_subtitle_new: Create a new package with bundling products and special price
packages.form_subtitle_edit: Update package details, pricing, and product quantities
packages.no_items_placeholder: No products added yet. Use the product dropdown search below to add items.

orders.title: Order Management
orders.subtitle: Manage customer purchase orders, delivery schedules, and payment tracking
orders.search_placeholder: Search by customer name, email, phone, or order notes...
orders.select_customer: Type to search customer by name, email, phone...
orders.no_items_placeholder: No packages added yet. Use the search dropdown above to select a package bundle.
orders.notes_placeholder: Optional special delivery instructions or order notes...
orders.form_subtitle_new: Fill in customer details, select delivery date, and add package items
orders.form_subtitle_edit: Update order status, delivery date, customer info, or package quantities
orders.confirm_delete_desc: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this order? This action cannot be undone.
orders.err_customer_required: Please select or specify customer information
orders.err_items_empty: Order must contain at least one package item
orders.err_quantity_invalid: Item quantity must be greater than 0

errors.bad_request_desc: The platform encountered an incorrect input or bad request syntax. Please check the form data or actions and try again.
errors.not_found_desc: The requested resource does not exist or has been moved. Double-check the URL or navigate using the side menu.
errors.server_error_desc: An unexpected error occurred on the application server. Our engineers have been alerted. Please try again shortly.
errors.generic_desc: The application encountered a client-side or network runtime exception.
